executives.name: James A. Burke
executives.background: Mr. Burke has served as President and Chief Executive Officer of Vistra since August 2022. He previously served as President and Chief Financial Officer from December 2020 to August 2022, and as Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer from October 2016 to December 2020. Prior to the Vistra reorganization, he served as Chairman and CEO of TXU Energy.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer

executives.name: Kristopher E. Moldovan
executives.background: Mr. Moldovan has served as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer since August 2022. He previously served as Senior Vice President and Treasurer from 2017 to 2022. He joined the company in 2006 and has held various leadership roles in finance and legal.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Stephen J. Muscato
executives.background: Mr. Muscato has served as Executive Vice President and Chief Commercial Officer since December 2020. He previously served as Senior Vice President and Chief Commercial Officer from 2016 to 2020. He is responsible for the company's commercial operations, including power marketing and fuel supply.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Commercial Officer

executives.name: Stephanie Zapata Moore
executives.background: Ms. Moore has served as Executive Vice President, General Counsel and Chief Compliance Officer since 2016. She is responsible for the company's legal and compliance functions. Prior to joining Vistra, she was Vice President and General Counsel of Luminant.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President, General Counsel and Chief Compliance Officer

executives.name: Scott A. Hudson
executives.background: Mr. Hudson has served as President of Vistra Retail since 2016. He is responsible for the company's retail brands, including TXU Energy. He previously held leadership roles at TXU Energy and in the consulting industry.

board_of_directors.name: Scott B. Helm
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Helm has served as Chairman of the Board since 2022 and as a director since 2016. He is a private investor and was previously a co-founder of Helm, Cullar & Hanley, LLC.

board_of_directors.name: James A. Burke
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Burke is the President and CEO of Vistra. He joined the board in 2022 upon his appointment as CEO.

board_of_directors.name: Arcilia Acosta
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Acosta is the President and CEO of CARCON Industries and Construction. She has served on the board since 2020.

board_of_directors.name: Lisa Crutchfield
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Crutchfield is the Managing Principal of Hudson Strategic Advisers, LLC. She has served on the board since 2023.
committees: Sustainability and Relevant Public Policy Committee

board_of_directors.name: Julie A. Lagacy
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Lagacy previously served as Chief Sustainability and Strategy Officer at Caterpillar Inc. She joined the board in 2023.
committees: Sustainability and Relevant Public Policy Committee

board_of_directors.name: John R. (Jack) Miller
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Miller is the retired Chairman and CEO of North American Coffee Partnership. He has served on the board since 2016.
